name: Toledo Finance Company
description_short: Toledo Finance Company offers personal installment loans to individuals and families across San Antonio and surrounding Texas counties, serving borrowers with all credit types.
description_long:
Toledo Finance Company is a personal installment lender based in San Antonio, Texas, operating from a physical location at 1115 SW Military Drive, Suite 103 on the south side of the city. The company serves Bexar County and surrounding areas including Medina, Atascosa, Wilson, Guadalupe, Comal, Bandera, and Kendall counties, covering towns such as Von Ormy, Castroville, Somerset, Devine, Floresville, and others. The company positions itself as a community-focused lender willing to work with borrowers across the credit spectrum.

Toledo Finance Company specializes in personal installment loans for various purposes including home improvements, car repairs, medical emergencies, and unexpected bills. They offer the ability to apply online and make payments remotely, while also maintaining in-person service at their San Antonio branch. The company emphasizes quick approval with decisions available within minutes, and they accept applicants with bad credit. They market the opportunity for borrowers to rebuild credit through timely monthly loan payments.

The company distinguishes itself through community involvement and membership in professional organizations. Toledo Finance is a member of the Texas Consumer Finance Association and the Better Business Bureau. They highlight community engagement through financial education programs and charitable donations to local organizations. The company also emphasizes accessibility, noting wheelchair-accessible parking and entrance at their physical location.

As a personal installment lender, Toledo Finance operates within a traditional consumer finance model typical of regional loan companies. The website provides limited specific information about loan amounts, terms, interest rates, or approval criteria. Prospective borrowers should contact the company directly at 210-924-9090 for detailed terms and requirements. The regulatory information shows NMLS numbers for related entities (Phoenix Financial Holdings, Inc. #2029924 and Loan South Finance Corp #2031643), indicating connection to a larger lending network.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Physical branch location with in-person service and accessible facilities in South San Antonio
Willing to consider applicants with bad credit or poor credit history
Quick approval decisions (within minutes) with online application option
Member of Texas Consumer Finance Association and Better Business Bureau
Extended service area covering 8+ surrounding counties and 15+ towns beyond San Antonio
Flexible loan purposes including home improvement, car repair, medical, and emergency bills
Community-focused with financial education programs and local charitable involvement
cons: Website provides no specific information on loan amounts, interest rates, or APRs
No details on typical approval criteria, qualification requirements, or credit score minimums
Limited transparency about terms, repayment periods, or monthly payment calculations
No online account management or payment history accessible from website
Single physical location limits accessibility for customers outside South San Antonio area
best_for: San Antonio and South Texas residents needing installment loans for unexpected expenses
Borrowers with poor or bad credit seeking lenders willing to work with their credit profile
Consumers preferring in-person service and community-based lending relationships
People in surrounding Bexar County and neighboring counties needing quick cash decisions
diagnosis: Toledo Finance Company is best suited for South Texas residents who need personal installment loans and prefer working with a community-based lender that accepts applicants with poor credit. The main caveat is that the website lacks essential transparency about loan terms, interest rates, and specific qualification requirements—borrowers must contact the company directly at 210-924-9090 for detailed pricing and approval criteria before applying.
services: Personal installment loans for home improvement
In-person loan applications at San Antonio branch
Credit-building loans for borrowers with poor credit
Loans to residents across Bexar, Medina, Atascosa, Wilson, Guadalupe, Comal, Bandera, and Kendall counties
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1115 SW Military Dr #103, San Antonio, TX 78221
